published_prior_art.cite: schroder2025conformal + tibshirani2019covariateshift: standard stochastic-intervention/covariate-shift change of measure
none: no located paper states this exact finite-list graded-tail envelope
tibshirani2019covariateshift: weighted conformal coverage under weighted exchangeability; jin2023robustconformal: robust conformal coverage over partially identified shifts
jin2023robustconformal and kiyani2024lengthoptimization do not give the stated certified-tail connected-interval frontier
qiu2023unknownshift gives the nearby finite-sample unknown-shift impossibility, but not the proposed certified-tail regret frontier

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question oeq:tail-local-sample-regret
novelty_flags.one_line: Qiu, Dobriban, and Tchetgen Tchetgen (2023), qiu2023unknownshift, is a closer omitted comparator: it proves finite-sample valid prediction sets are uninformative under unknown covariate shift, defining the exact obstruction that an externally certified ratio list must escape.

soundness_flags.label: Assumption ass:compatible-target-law; Proposition prop:robust-wcp-coverage
soundness_flags.one_line: A single random pair T cannot simultaneously have the distinct Q_v marginals required for every v in V_epsilon; replace it by the actual Q_w target conditional on w, or introduce candidate-specific target copies and restate coverage.

soundness_flags.label: Definition def:minimax-regret; Open-ended Question oeq:tail-local-sample-regret
soundness_flags.one_line: R_n compares unrestricted connected interval rules J to the score-centred robust oracle I_rob, so it is not an excess-length regret against a like-for-like oracle; restrict J to score-centred nested intervals or benchmark against the optimal connected robust population interval.

soundness_flags.label: Assumption ass:quantile-margin
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed all-scale lower-CDF-increment condition is a strong local anti-concentration assumption, not the standard condition established under the cited name by yang2024drcalibration; retag it novel with a setting-specific justification or cite a source using this exact condition.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: technical_internal_limitation / ass:certificate-containment
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The finite ratio list, its envelope, and containment of the true ratio are externally certified inputs rather than quantities learned from D_n.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: All coverage and frontier claims are conditional on a fixed externally certified finite list that contains w.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Repair target sampling by conditioning on the single actual ratio w, then formulate robust validity uniformly over laws whose w lies in the list; alternatively give each hypothetical v its own target draw.

Make the regret benchmark coherent by restricting J to intervals centred at m generated by the stated nested score, or redefine I_rob as the optimal connected robust interval over the same rule class.
Add qiu2023unknownshift and state precisely which certified-list assumption defeats its unknown-shift impossibility, including why this remains informative when gamma is in (1,2).
Specify an auditable mechanism that certifies finite-list containment and the polynomial envelope, with a worked nontrivial certificate family satisfying the conditions.

recommended_next_step: Revise the incompatible target-sampling premise and the minimax comparator class, correct the quantile-margin status, and add the unknown-shift impossibility comparator before advancing.
